description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and versatility with the 2026 Honda HR-V LX. This exceptional SUV is poised to elevate your driving experience, offering a seamless combination of advanced features and exceptional efficiency.   Enjoy the convenience of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, allowing you to seamlessly integrate your smartphone and access your favorite apps on the go.  Stay connected and in control with the 180-Watt Audio System, complete with 4 speakers for an immersive listening experience.  Maintain a comfortable cabin climate with the automatic temperature control and rear window defroster, ensuring you and your passengers stay cozy no matter the weather.  Enhance your safety with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including Adaptive Cruise Control, Automatic High-Beam Headlights, and a Rear-View Camera.  Effortlessly navigate tight spaces and conquer the open road with the HR-V's responsive power steering and four-wheel independent suspension, providing a smooth and confident ride.  With its striking Green exterior and a fuel-efficient 2.0L I4 DOHC 16V i-VTEC engine, the 2026 Honda HR-V LX is the perfect companion for your daily commute and weekend adventures. Boasting an impressive EPA-estimated 26 city/32 highway MPG, this SUV delivers exceptional efficiency without compromising on power or capability.  The HR-V's versatile interior offers ample space and flexibility, with a split-folding rear seat that allows you to easily accommodate your cargo needs. The interior's spacious layout includes power-folding third-row seats, a conversation mirror for easy communication with rear passengers, and a removable center console for added flexibility.Technology and convenience are seamlessly integrated with features like intelligent key entry, push-button start, and a premium audio system with dual rear entertainment screens, wireless headphones, and Bluetooth streaming audio. The 8-inch primary display offers easy access to SiriusXM Traffic real-time information and integrated voice-activated navigation, keeping every journey connected and efficient.Safety is a top priority in the Quest LE, equipped with six airbags, anti-lock braking system (ABS), blind-spot monitoring, and a 360-degree aerial view camera system that enhances awareness in tight spaces. Additional safety enhancements include front and rear parking sensors, a tire pressure monitoring system, and projector beam headlights that provide clear illumination at night.Finished in Brilliant Silver with a luxurious gray interior, the 2014 Quest LE FWD offers an exceptional combination of style, comfort, and practicality  making it a premium choice for families seeking refinement and reliability in their everyday travels.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Quad Seating (4 Buckets),AM/FM Stereo,Automatic CVT,Bluetooth Wireless,Vehicle Dynamic Control,F&R Head Curtain Air Bags,Alloy Wheels,Power Third Row,Traction Control,Power Windows,7-Passenger Seating,ABS (4-Wheel),Cruise Control,XM Satellite,Air Conditioning,FWD,Tilt & Telescoping Wheel,Fog Lights,Leather,Side Air Bags,Backup Camera,HID Headlamps,Power Door Locks,Keyless Entry,V6 3.5 Liter,Dual Air Bags,Blind-Spot Warning,Dual Power Seats,Anti-Theft System,Air Conditioning Rear,Power Sliding Doors,Power Steering,Heated Seats,Bose Premium Sound,Keyless Start,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Navigation System

description: 2015 Chevrolet Impala LT with 101,318 miles. This full-size sedan offers a smooth ride, strong V6 power, and a spacious interior that remains comfortable and refined. The audio system includes AM/FM, CD, MP3 playback, auxiliary input, and Bluetooth connectivity, with SiriusXM capability for those who choose to subscribe. The rear flip-and-fold seat adds extra versatility for cargo when needed.This one is equipped with the LT Sunroof Package, giving you a power sunroof and Universal Home Remote, adding convenience and a more open feel to the cabin. Remote start, keyless entry, and a touring suspension round out its practical features.Safety includes traction and stability control, front and side curtain airbags, a tire pressure monitor, OnStar with available navigation assistance, and child safety locks. With its spacious interior and advanced features, the Cruze LS Auto is sure to impress. Plus, it's a 2015 model, making it a reliable and modern choice for any driver.Under the hood, you'll find a powerful and fuel-efficient 1.8L engine, paired with an automatic transmission for a smooth and effortless driving experience. The exterior is designed to turn heads with its bold lines and chrome accents, making it stand out on the road.Step inside and you'll find a spacious and comfortable cabin, equipped with cloth seats and plenty of legroom for both front and rear passengers. The Cruze LS Auto also comes with a variety of convenient features, such as power windows and locks, a 6-speaker audio system, and Bluetooth connectivity.But that's not all, this 2015 Chevrolet Cruze also has advanced safety features to give you peace of mind on the road. With 10 airbags, stability control, and a rearview camera, you can feel confident and secure behind the wheel.Don't miss your chance to own this 2015 Chevrolet Cruze LS Auto, with its extra spacing for a more comfortable and enjoyable driving experience. Visit our dealership today to take it for a test drive and see for yourself why this car is the perfect choice for you. description: Performance luxury and twin-turbocharged power define this 2016 INFINITI Q50 Red Sport 400 AWD a sport sedan engineered to deliver exhilarating acceleration with refined comfort. Powered by a 3.0L twin-turbo V6 engine paired with a responsive automatic transmission and intelligent all-wheel drive system this Q50 produces impressive horsepower while maintaining confident traction in all driving conditions.Finished in Majestic White the exterior showcases aggressive styling with signature LED lighting bold body lines and Red Sport performance detailing that set it apart. More information about the 2017 Ford F-150: The F-150 might be the most important vehicle made by Ford. It continues to be one of their top-selling vehicles, encouraging Ford to put their best foot forward with the 2017 model. The F-150 competes with the Ram, the Chevrolet Silverado and the GMC Sierra 1500, among others, in the full-sized truck category. Ford is clearly pushing its new technology and new ideas with the F-150, offering plenty of options not available anywhere else in this class, such as a 360-degree camera and integrated loading ramps stowed in the pickup bed. A smaller, more fuel efficient EcoBoost engine is also available, which should further improve fuel economy while providing the same kind of horsepower that would normally be delivered by mid-grade V8 engines. At the same time, the F-150 continues to excel at traditional truck tasks, with a best in class towing capacity of 12,200 pounds when properly equipped. NO DEALER FEES!VEHICLE DESCRIPTION:  The 2019 BMW X4 is a luxury sport activity coupe that perfectly combines performance, refinement, and cutting-edge technology. Built on BMWs renowned xDrive platform, this SUV offers thrilling power and precision handling while maintaining the comfort and sophistication expected from a premium vehicle.ENGINE & PERFORMANCE:  Engine: Turbocharged 2.0L inline-4 delivering dynamic acceleration and smooth efficiency.  Transmission: 8-speed Sport Automatic transmission with paddle shifters for responsive control.  Drive: BMW xDrive all-wheel-drive system provides optimal traction and cornering stability.  Suspension: Sport-tuned suspension ensures a confident and agile driving experience.  Performance: Quick acceleration and refined ride make this X4 ideal for both city and highway driving.INTERIOR & COMFORT:  Seating: Premium SensaTec upholstery with 10-way power-adjustable front sport seats.  Technology: iDrive 6.0 infotainment system with a 10.25-inch high-resolution display.  Sound: Hi-Fi 12-speaker audio system delivers immersive sound quality.  Convenience: Push-button start, ambient interior lighting, and automatic climate control.  Luxury Touches: Leather-wrapped steering wheel and aluminum trim accents for a refined cabin feel.EXTERIOR & DESIGN:  Body Style: Sleek Sport Activity Coupe design with coupe-like roofline and muscular stance.  Lighting: LED headlights and taillights for improved visibility and a modern look.  Wheels: 19-inch alloy wheels enhance both aesthetics and on-road performance.  Color: Striking design elements complemented by signature BMW styling cues.  Aerodynamics: Sculpted body lines improve airflow and fuel efficiency.SAFETY & SECURITY:  Driver Assistance: Includes frontal collision warning, lane departure alert, and rearview camera.  Braking: Advanced anti-lock braking system (ABS) with brake assist for confident stopping power.  Airbags: Comprehensive airbag coverage for driver and passengers.  Traction Control: Dynamic Stability Control (DSC) and Dynamic Traction Control (DTC) enhance road grip.  Security: Keyless entry, anti-theft system, and immobilizer for peace of mind.UTILITY & FUNCTIONALITY:  Cargo Space: Generous rear cargo area with split-folding rear seats for added versatility.  Comfort: Quiet cabin design for long-distance driving comfort.  Efficiency: Turbocharged engine offers a balance of power and fuel economy.  Connectivity: USB and Bluetooth integration for effortless connectivity on the go.  Durability: Built to BMWs high-quality standards for long-lasting performance and luxury.#BMWX4 #LuxurySUV #BMWxDrive #SportActivityCoupe #Turbocharged #AWDSUV #NoDealerFees #PerformanceSUV #BMWLife description: Discover exceptional luxury, comfort, and confidence when you choose the 2020 INFINITI QX60 LUXE, available now at Fisher Auto in Boulder, Colorado. Designed for families, adventurers, and everyday drivers who want more from their SUV, this premium three-row crossover delivers a refined driving experience backed by the trusted service and community reputation Fisher Auto is known for.  The 2020 INFINITI QX60 LUXE stands out with its elegant exterior styling, sleek aerodynamic lines, and signature INFINITI front grille. Step inside and youre greeted by a spacious, thoughtfully crafted cabin with seating for up to seven. Plush leather-appointed seats, intuitive controls, and premium materials create an environment that feels both modern and remarkably comfortable. With its smooth ride quality and quiet interior, every drivewhether through mountain passes or city streetsfeels effortlessly luxurious.  Under the hood, the QX60 LUXE is powered by a strong yet refined 3.5L V6 engine, offering plenty of acceleration for merging onto highways or navigating scenic Colorado roads. Its smooth continuously variable transmission helps deliver efficient performance without sacrificing responsiveness. Available all-wheel drive adds extra traction and capability for snowy Boulder winters or weekend adventures into the Rockies.  Inside, convenience and technology come together beautifully. The 2020 INFINITI QX60 LUXE features tri-zone automatic climate control, heated front seats, and a power moonroof that fills the cabin with natural light. The intuitive infotainment system provides easy access to audio, navigation, and connectivity features to keep everyone entertained and informed. Flexible interior spaceincluding easy third-row access and fold-flat seatingmakes it perfect for families, cargo, and spontaneous trips.  Safety is at the forefront of the QX60 LUXE. Equipped with advanced driver-assistance features such as blind-spot monitoring, a rearview camera, predictive forward collision warning, and backup collision intervention, this SUV helps you stay confident on every drive. Whether commuting through downtown Boulder or exploring the open road, youll appreciate the added peace of mind.  When you shop at Fisher Auto, youre choosing a locally trusted dealership with decades of commitment to honesty, transparency, and customer care. Their friendly team is dedicated to helping you find the right vehicle at the right value, and their service department ensures your INFINITI continues performing at its best for years to come.  Experience luxury, performance, and reliability in one beautifully engineered package. Visit Fisher Auto in Boulder to explore the 2020 INFINITI QX60 LUXEa premium SUV that elevates every journey.  Located in Boulder, Colorado, near Longmont, Louisville, Erie, Broomfield, and we are also a close drive for those in the Denver Metro Area. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     Give us a call to check vehicle availability or stop by for a test drive! description: The 2023 GMC Sierra 1500 AT4 in Sterling Metallic offers the blend of real-world capability and everyday comfort that buyers in the Texas Panhandle expect. Powered by the efficient 3.0L Duramax I6 paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission, this truck delivers strong torque for towing, confident highway performance, and practical fuel economy for long days between Amarillo, Dalhart, and the ranch. Its factory-built 4WD system and AT4 off-road suspension make it a dependable option for gravel roads, pasture work, or job-site travel, while still providing a quiet, composed ride for family use.  Inside, the AT4 trim gives you a well-designed cabin with supportive seating, modern technology, and thoughtful storage suited for both work and travel. The layout is straightforward and easy to use, whether you're hauling supplies, running a service route, or driving kids across town. Exterior details like the AT4 grille, red tow hooks, and performance-oriented stance add presence without compromising function.  This Sierra shows the level of care you want to see in a previously owned truck and remains a strong choice for buyers who need durability without giving up comfort. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Predictive brake assist - Be prepared for your big brake. Predictive brake assist monitors the available distance in front of you compared to your vehicles speed.  If your speed exceeds the required distance to stop short of a collision, it readies your brakes to apply maximum stopping force when you use them.  Predictive brake assist helps see to it that you stop.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     Give us a call to check vehicle availability or stop by for a test drive! description: Vehicle Details: Discover the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and technology with this pre-owned 2023 Ford Explorer Limited. With just 15,673 miles on the odometer, this SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience. Equipped with a robust 4WD system and a 4-cylinder, 2.3L engine, it delivers both efficiency and power for all your adventures.  Inside, you'll find a host of premium features designed to enhance every journey. The integrated Navigation system ensures you reach your destination with ease, while Remote Start offers convenience on those chilly mornings. Adaptive Cruise Control provides a smooth and stress-free driving experience, adjusting to the flow of traffic seamlessly.  Stay connected and entertained with XM Radio, offering a wide variety of music, sports, and news channels. The Back-Up Camera ensures safety and ease when parking, providing a clear view of your surroundings.  This 2023 Ford Explorer Limited combines practicality with luxury, making it an ideal choice for families and individuals alike. Don't miss the opportunity to own this versatile SUV, designed to meet your every need. Visit us today to learn more and take it for a test drive. Your next adventure awaits!  Equipment: Apple CarPlay: Seamless smartphone integration for it - stay connected and entertained on the go! The installed navigation system will keep you on the right path. The leather seats in it are a must for buyers looking for comfort, durability, and style. Protect this 2023 Ford Explorer  from unwanted accidents with a cutting edge backup camera system. It is pure luxury with a heated steering wheel. This unit has auto-adjust speed for safe following. Bluetooth technology is built into this 1/2 ton suv, keeping your hands on the steering wheel and your focus on the road. Start this vehicle from inside with remote start. The vehicle is equipped with the latest generation of XM/Sirius Radio. It comes equipped with Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration on the road. When you encounter slick or muddy roads, you can engage the four wheel drive on this 1/2 ton suv and drive with confidence.
